name: openEuler Desktop SIG Repository List

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler Desktop SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for .. The SIG has 34 core members and maintains 433 repositories in the Desktop and Graphics domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler Desktop SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler Desktop SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at Desktop@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler Desktop SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler Desktop SIG maintains 433 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/Desktop.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler Desktop SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler Desktop SIG has 6 Maintainers, including: Luo Shengwei, senlin Xia, yanan. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
